justification: All 4 files created with correct paths. All 8 ACs explicitly implemented and mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage. renewSubscription uses exactly 2_592_000_000 ms. cancelledAt/cancellationDate field present (AC4 sets it). 18 tests cover all 8 ACs with explicit test names. files_changed lists all 4 files with purpose.

observations.text: All 4 files created at correct paths with clear purpose descriptions
All 8 ACs mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage with specific test names
THIRTY_DAYS_MS constant matches spec exactly (2_592_000_000)
Edge cases AC5 (already cancelled) and AC7 (renew cancelled) explicitly implemented and tested
18 tests providing thorough coverage beyond minimum requirements
Defensive copy on save to prevent aliasing bugs shows engineering quality
Field named 'cancellationDate' rather than 'cancelledAt' as specified in rubric — functionally equivalent but naming deviates from spec

trials.justification: All 4 files created with correct paths. All 8 ACs implemented with correct error codes. renewSubscription uses exactly 2592000000 ms. Tests cover all 8 ACs with 18 tests. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs. files_changed lists all 4 files. However, the Subscription type uses 'cancellationDate' instead of the required 'cancelledAt' field name, which is a deviation from the spec.

observations.text: All 4 files created at correct paths under .tmp/subscriptions/
All 8 ACs implemented with exact error codes: SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND, SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_CANCELLED, CANNOT_RENEW_CANCELLED
THIRTY_DAYS_MS = 2_592_000_000 matches the required 2592000000 ms exactly
18 tests covering all 8 ACs including edge cases (AC5, AC7)
acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs with test names
SubscriptionRepository interface with save, findById, findByUserId methods
SubscriptionService injects repository via constructor
Field named 'cancellationDate' instead of spec-required 'cancelledAt' — the type description says 'optional cancellationDate' rather than 'cancelledAt (optional)' as specified in the rubric
SubscriptionStatus described as union type but spec requires status field to be exact string literal type 'active' | 'cancelled'—implementation may match but naming diverges from spec terminology
